content.en:
Of course.

The Lord of Eternal Zero doesn't care about being perceived by the Chaos Giants.

Swish!

After the golden bird passed through the domain river of the Taichao Domain, it entered the Taichao Domain and flew directly to the Holy City on the other side near the Holy Mountain on the other side.

The Holy City on the other side is also the venue for the Eternal Talents Tournament.

After all, the Holy Mountain on the other side is within the forces, and it is impossible for the Bone Transformation Realm from the outside world to enter, so it can only be held in the Holy City on the other side.

After arriving at the Holy City on the other side, the Lord of Eternal Zero went to chat with his old friend, leaving Ye Tian alone in the accommodation arranged by the Holy Mountain on the other side.

The other side.

Ye Tian's vest and the Lord of Dong Yuan also followed Jun Zu to the Holy City on the other side of the Taichao Domain.

However, he did not meet with his waistcoat, so as not to expose some problems.

Comparatively speaking, the Lord of his vest Dongyuan can talk a lot about Jun Zu and learn more about it.

After all, Jun Zu is the master of his vest, and it is normal to have such treatment.

Time passed slowly, and more and more geniuses from the other side came to the Holy City on the other side of the Taichao Domain.

There aren't many other-level geniuses in one area, and some areas don't even have a one-level genius.

But this time, the Eternal Genius Tournament held by the Holy Mountain on the other side and other forces attracted forces from many regions, and the number of geniuses on the other side of these regions together was quite a lot.

Moreover, the number of other-level geniuses in the Taichao Domain itself was above double digits.

Therefore, the number of other shore-level geniuses participating this time was above the triple digits.

Therefore, it is very difficult to compete for the top 10 places.

this day.

The Lord of Eternal Zero took Ye Tian to meet an existence beyond the Bone Transformation Realm, the Lord of Gu Heng, and another genius of the other side.

"Mountain Lord, this is the newly born genius of our Gu Heng Mountain, the Lord of Endless!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero introduced.

"I've seen the Mountain Lord!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

This was the first time he had met the mountain lord of Gu Heng Mountain, the Lord of Gu Heng.

In the past, the Lord of Guheng Mountain had not been in Guheng Mountain, but had taken his son Lord of Guxu to experience.

Now, the Eternal Genius Tournament of the Taichao Domain has begun, and the Lord of Gu Heng has brought his son, the Lord of Gu Xu, to the Taichao Domain.

"Well, that's good!"

The Lord of Gu Heng nodded slightly, but he wasn't very excited.

Ye Tian also understood.

For the Lord of Gu Heng, it was enough to cultivate his son, the Lord of Gu Xu, he didn't want to continue cultivating a second other-level genius.

But today's Guheng Mountain has many deputy mountain masters, and the strength of the deputy mountain master is not necessarily much weaker than the mountain master.

Therefore, Gu Hengzhi can't be in charge of other deputy mountain masters, nor can he control the master of eternal zero.

At this time.

The Lord of the Ancient Void didn't have anything to say to Ye Tian, the two sides just said a few words and didn't continue to communicate.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Gu Heng left with his son, the Lord of Gu Xu.

Lord of Eternal Zero: "The Lord of the Mountain is like this, this time, you should increase your knowledge, don't be the first to the bottom." "

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

In addition to the Lord of the Ancient Void, he also met the True Extreme Lord of the Ancient Demon Sea in the Holy City on the other side, and the other party also came here.

Finally this day.

The day has come for the Eternal Genius Tournament.

If it is a genius who has not yet arrived, it will be regarded as giving up.

......

On the other side, in the Holy City, in an area.

A group of other shore-level geniuses came here, and there were a large number of onlookers from the Bone Transformation Realm, basically all of whom were cultivators above the Eight Bone Transformation Realm, and there were also existences such as the Lord of Eternal Zero and Jun Zu.

Rumble!!!!

An incomparably majestic figure stepped out of nothingness.

Seeing this, the Lord of Eternal Zero and Jun Zu all stood up and said respectfully, "I have seen the Lord of Taichao!"

"It's him!"

Ye Tian was also learning about the situation in the Taichao Domain during this time.

For example, the Lord of Taichao, this is the strongest person in the Taichao Domain!

It is rumored that an existence comparable to the Lord of Eternal Zero, the Lord of Chaos has killed as many as two digits, and his strength is extremely terrifying.

Moreover, the Lord of Chaos is also the oldest existence in the Chaos Domain.

Therefore, the other powerhouses were extremely respectful to the Lord of Peace.

"Sit down!" said the Lord of Chaos with a wave of his hand.

At this time, the Lord of Eternal Zero sat down one by one.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Chaos announced: "Let's start the Eternal Genius Tournament, Lord of the Ice Rim, you can announce the rules!"

Wow!

A humanoid creature covered in ice crystals stepped out.

He is the Lord of the Ice.

The Lord of the Ice Rim announced, "In the Eternal Genius Competition, the cultivation of every Genius on the Other Shore will be limited to eight Bone Transformation Realms. This time, there were a total of 186 other geniuses participating in the competition. In the first round of the competition, the top 100 will be decided, and the other 86 will be eliminated directly. The format of the game is a two-to-two battle, with each person fighting five games, ranked according to their record. If the 100 or so places have the same record, they need to continue to compete with each other to determine the top 100. "

"The second round of the competition will determine the top 50, and it will still be five games. "

"The top 20 will be decided in the third round, or five games!"

"The fourth round is to determine the top 10, and it's still five games!"

"The top ten, each other level talent needs to play nine matches to determine the specific ranking of the top ten!"

When the Lord of the Ice Rim said this, all the geniuses of the other side level knew about it.

The next moment.

Golden balls emerged, densely packed into the endless void.

The next moment.

An incomparably large formation enveloped the place.

Followed by.

The Lord of Chaos took out a roulette wheel and integrated it into the formation, and one after another Void Rings appeared.

"Enter the inside of the formation!"

The Lord of Ice shouted.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the other side level geniuses entered.

On cultivation.

Ye Tian's true body copy body and the vest of the Lord of Dong Yuan are all six bone transformation realms, and they belong to the cultivation at the bottom.

But.

Entering the inside of the formation, a strange energy poured into his body.

The next moment.

Rumble!!!!

His cultivation broke through quickly.

Seven bone transformations!

Eight Bone Transformations!

Eight Bone Transformation Realm Peaks!

Then, his cultivation was fixed and could not change in the slightest.

And some of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm other side level geniuses, their cultivation quickly decreased, and they became the peak of the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm.

In the blink of an eye, the cultivation of all the other side level geniuses was fixed at the peak of the eighth bone transformation realm, so that they would be fair to each other.

"What an ingenious method, as if I have really reached the peak of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Inside this formation, there are still thrones, and every other shore-level genius sits on the throne, waiting for the game to begin.

Soon.

The race is on.
